emails.subject: NPR Inquiry
emails.body: Ken Smith mentioned that Dave Parquet sent out an email about this issue do either of you have a copy of it? If so, please forward to me. Thanks! kd Forwarded by Karen Denne/Corp/Enron on 05/11/2001 07:01 PM "Ken Smith" <ken@kdscommunications.com> on 05/11/2001 03:29:29 PM Please respond to "Ken Smith" <ken@kdscommunications.com>
